title: Microsoft Excel 365 Sync

posts.author: Rego91 (Gero)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

As monday.com even highlights Microsoft Excel on its integrations homepage (monday.com Work Platform | Gemacht fürs Business, geschaffen fürs Herz.), I’m quite surprised that there’s currently no direct way to automatically synchronize data between a monday.com board and a cloud-based Excel file.

At the moment, the only option seems to be manual import and export — which works, but is far from ideal. An automated synchronization (similar to what’s possible in Jira) would be incredibly valuable for professional data analysis, where monday.com still feels somewhat limited.

@Monday.com: Are you planning to release such an integration? And if so, is there any timeline you can share?

Thanks a lot for any support and feedback
